_comment: 30-item eval set for the classify node. Covers all four query types plus boundary cases. Edit `expected` if you intentionally change classifier behaviour.

items.query: hello
hi there
thanks!
thank you
good morning
how are you?
what can you do?
who are you?
are you an AI?
bye
What is the TED score?
Who wrote the Docling paper?
What is the embedding dimension we use?
When was the chunking strategy last updated?
What model does the rerank node call?
How many tokens per parent chunk?
What is the default cosine threshold for the semantic cache?
Compare BERT and GPT-4 on retrieval quality and latency.
What are the differences between dense, sparse, and hybrid retrieval?
Summarise the indemnity terms across the three vendor MSAs and flag any mismatched cap of liability.
How do BM25 and dense embeddings compare for technical documents versus legal contracts?
What are the pros and cons of using Qdrant vs pgvector for our use case?
Compare the ingestion latency of OCR-on vs OCR-off across PDF, DOCX, and HTML.
What were the changes to the auth, billing, and storage modules between v1 and v2?
How do I run inference on a new tenant?
Steps to set up the development environment from scratch.
How can I add a new ingestion pipeline for video transcripts?
Walk me through deploying a new release to production.
How do I rotate the OpenRouter API key without downtime?
Show me how to onboard a new tenant end-to-end.
